title: Dark Web Intercept: Telegram_RaaS_Syndicate - Potential Threat Activity

scripts.content:
#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 — Block threat IPs for: Dark Web Intercept: Telegram_RaaS_Syndicate - Potential Thre
iptables -A INPUT -s 185.15.10.22 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 185.15.10.22 -j DROP
echo 'Firewall rules applied'

| CDB APEX v37.0 Threat Hunt Query
index=* ((dest_ip IN ("185.15.10.22")) OR (query IN ("185.15.10.22"))) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, action | sort -count
